description: Use-After-Free via callback function pointer. Timer handler frees struct, but callback still references it. Complex control flow with error paths.

sast_findings.message: Memory pointed to by 'ctx' is freed twice.
free(): Ensure that the pointer is not used after being freed.
Memory leak: ctx is allocated but not freed on error path.
malloc(): Check return value for NULL.

threat_context.title: Missing Release of Memory after Effective Lifetime

must_reject.reason: malloc return is checked on line 21
ctx is returned on success - no leak on normal path
